SignupSettingsCard.errUpdateFailed: Update failed, please try again later
SignupSettingsCard.errQuota: Enter a whole number from 1 to 200 for the limit (blank = unlimited)
SignupSettingsCard.heading: 🙋 Open public sign-up
SignupSettingsCard.hint: Drop-in players can sign up right on the home page and leave you a note; they join only after approval. Anyone with the password still joins directly, no approval needed.
SignupSettingsCard.quotaNote: Even when full, people can still sign up — you decide who's in
